message:
feat(fsqlite-wal, fsqlite-types): implement native commit protocol and operating modes (bd-15jh)

Add OperatingMode enum (Compatibility/Native), expand CommitCapsule with full
SSI witness refs, implement WriteCoordinator with 8-step native commit protocol
including FCW validation, gap-free commit_seq allocation, group commit batching,
two mandatory fsync barriers, and CommitMarker chain linking. 11 unit tests
covering all 6 required protocol scenarios plus invariant checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
